narrative:
Riverlea-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 495 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.6 percentage points.
